seed_instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances.
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 14 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain at least 21 sentences.
instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances. The response must contain exactly 14 sentences. The response must contain at least 21 sentences.
response: This epic 7-day US West Coast road trip balances iconic cities with breathtaking natural wonders. Day 1 begins in Los Angeles, California, where you can explore Santa Monica and Venice Beach before driving north toward the stunning Pacific Coast Highway. The drive to Santa Barbara is approximately 95 miles, offering beautiful coastal views. Day 2 focuses on the central coast, perhaps visiting Hearst Castle and continuing your journey toward San Francisco. This leg covers about 150 miles, making for a scenic drive. Day 3 is dedicated to San Francisco; spend the day visiting Alcatraz, driving across the Golden Gate Bridge, and exploring Fisherman's Wharf. Day 4 takes you inland to Yosemite National Park, a drive of roughly 400 miles from San Francisco, requiring an early start. Spend the entire day hiking among the giant sequoias and viewing El Capitan. Day 5 transitions to the high desert, driving toward the area near Death Valley National Park, a drive of about 200 miles. Be sure to experience the extreme landscapes of Death Valley, perhaps visiting Badwater Basin. Day 6 heads toward the Oregon coast, a significant drive of around 450 miles, allowing time to stop at scenic overlooks along the way. Explore the rugged beauty of the Oregon coastline in the late afternoon. Day 7 concludes the adventure by driving into Portland, Oregon, where you can enjoy the vibrant food scene and unique culture before departing. This final drive is approximately 150 miles, wrapping up your incredible West Coast journey.<turn|>

Explore the rugged beauty of the Oregon coastline in the late afternoon. Day 7 concludes the adventure by driving into Portland, Oregon, where you can enjoy the vibrant food scene and unique culture before departing.
